name: wealth-tax-calculator-wordpress
description: Build system for Billionaire Wealth Tax Calculator WordPress plugin

scripts.minify: npm run minify:js && npm run minify:css
scripts.build: npm run minify && npm run zip
scripts.release:
echo 'Build and create release zip' && npm run build && echo '
✓ Build complete! Next steps:
  1. Commit changes
  2. Create GitHub release with tag v1.2.0
  3. Upload wealth-tax-calculator.zip as release asset'

author: Molotools
